Class UserLogin

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.users.controller.UserLogin
@Component public class UserLogin extends Object
Service component for managing user login/account records in the database.

This class handles user authentication, account creation, and user management operations. It supports login validation, user registration, account activation/deactivation, and user search functionality.

Key functionality:

  • Validate user login credentials
  • Create new user accounts
  • Fetch user information by various criteria
  • Activate/deactivate user accounts
  • Search users by username or email
  • Save user login records individually or in batch

  • Constructor Details

    • UserLogin

      public UserLogin()

  • Method Details

    • checkAndRetrieveValidLogin

      public UserLoginTBL checkAndRetrieveValidLogin(String logincredential, String password)
      Checks the database for valid login credentials.

      This method searches for a user by username or email address, validates that the account is active, and verifies that the provided password matches the stored password hash.

      Parameters:
      logincredential - the username or email address to authenticate with
      password - the password to validate
      Returns:
      the user login record if authentication succeeds, null otherwise

    • checkifUserExists

      public boolean checkifUserExists(String emailaddress, String username)
      Checks if an email address or username already exists in the database.
      Parameters:
      emailaddress - the email address to check
      username - the username to check
      Returns:
      true if the email or username exists, false otherwise

    • createNewUser

      @Deprecated public UserLoginTBL createNewUser(CreateNewUserREQ createNewUserREQ)
      Deprecated.
      Use add(CreateNewUserREQ) instead
      Creates a new user account.
      Parameters:
      createNewUserREQ - the request object containing user creation details
      Returns:
      the created user login record with generated ID

    • add

      public void add(UserLoginTBL userLoginTBL)
      Saves a user login record to the database.
      Parameters:
      userLoginTBL - the user login record to save

    • add

      @Deprecated public UserLoginTBL add(CreateNewUserREQ createNewUserREQ)
      Deprecated.
      This method should be replaced with a more modern approach
      Creates and saves a new user account from a request object.

      This method populates a new user login record with the provided details, encrypts the password, generates a unique user key, and saves the record to the database.

      Parameters:
      createNewUserREQ - the request object containing user creation details
      Returns:
      the saved user login record with generated ID

    • fetch

      public Optional<UserLoginTBL> fetch(String emailAddress, String username)
      Fetches a user by email address and username.
      Parameters:
      emailAddress - the email address to search for
      username - the username to search for
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the user login record if found, empty otherwise

    • fetch

      public Optional<UserLoginTBL> fetch(String emailAddress, String username, int active)
      Fetches a user by email address, username, and active status.
      Parameters:
      emailAddress - the email address to search for
      username - the username to search for
      active - the active status to filter by
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the user login record if found, empty otherwise

    • fetch

      public Optional<UserLoginTBL> fetch(String emailAddress, String username, String userkey, int active)
      Fetches a user by email address, username, user key, and active status.
      Parameters:
      emailAddress - the email address to search for
      username - the username to search for
      userkey - the user key to search for
      active - the active status to filter by
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the user login record if found, empty otherwise

    • fetchByUserKey

      public Optional<UserLoginTBL> fetchByUserKey(String userkey, int active)
      Fetches a user by user key and active status.
      Parameters:
      userkey - the user key to search for
      active - the active status to filter by
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the user login record if found, empty otherwise

    • fetch

      public Optional<UserLoginTBL> fetch(int id, int active)
      Fetches a user by ID and active status.
      Parameters:
      id - the user ID to search for
      active - the active status to filter by (currently unused)
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the user login record if found, empty otherwise

    • update

      public void update(UserLoginTBL userLoginTBL)
      Updates a user login record in the database.
      Parameters:
      userLoginTBL - the user login record to update

    • isPasswordValid

      public Boolean isPasswordValid(String password, UserLoginTBL user)
      Validates if a password matches the stored password hash for a user.
      Parameters:
      password - the plain text password to validate
      user - the user record containing the stored password hash
      Returns:
      true if the password is valid, false otherwise

    • deactivateUser

      public void deactivateUser(UserLoginTBL userLoginTBL)
      Deactivates a user account.
      Parameters:
      userLoginTBL - the user account to deactivate

    • reactivateUser

      public void reactivateUser(UserLoginTBL userLoginTBL)
      Reactivates a previously deactivated user account.
      Parameters:
      userLoginTBL - the user account to reactivate

    • searchUserUsername

      public List<UserLoginTBL> searchUserUsername(String searchString)
      Searches for active users by username prefix.
      Parameters:
      searchString - the prefix to search for in usernames
      Returns:
      list of active users whose username starts with the search string

    • searchUserEmailAddress

      public List<UserLoginTBL> searchUserEmailAddress(String searchString)
      Searches for active users by email address prefix.
      Parameters:
      searchString - the prefix to search for in email addresses
      Returns:
      list of active users whose email address starts with the search string

    • save

      public void save()
      Saves the current user login record from the data field to the database.

      The saved entity (with generated ID) is stored back in the data field.

    • saveAll

      public void saveAll()
      Saves all user login records in the dataList to the database in a batch operation.

      After saving, the list is cleared and repopulated with the saved entities (including any generated IDs).
